title: Build a Real-World Multi-Agent AI System using LangGraph,  APIs and Memory
summary: Tutorial demonstrating construction of a multi-agent AI travel planning system using LangGraph, Groq's Llama 3.3 70B model, PostgreSQL for memory, and external APIs like AviationStack and Tavily. Four specialized agents handle flight booking, hotel search, itinerary planning, and final response synthesis.
